title: Lucidity+
description: Voxy Supported! The perfect balance of performance, features, and visuals in one modpack.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bfac9f828194f179addd258d8a42a57ca6b931f.png)
![Div](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f18ac79b079feacf2eb00b048b7436519b358da6.png)
![Main Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7c2d06250fe3444dbb86e9b109c0b2469f1a531.png)
![Div](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f18ac79b079feacf2eb00b048b7436519b358da6.png)
![FPS comparisons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a155adf0a5a9eda1d216d60bb74d7d00a4c37e0a.png)
### No sacrifices on visual quality!
> **Want Minecraft to look great and perform better?**
> Lucidity+ delivers **smoother performance** without sacrificing visual quality.
### Peforms **exceptionally** with shaders ON or OFF!
> Get **stable and high FPS** with or without the use of shaders. 
> Included are some shaders that support Voxy so you can enjoy the views!
### The perfect modpack for beginners!
> Lucidity+ has been configured to optimise performance settings and keep the pretty stuff so that you don't have to set it up all yourself.

![Div](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f18ac79b079feacf2eb00b048b7436519b358da6.png)
<details>
<summary>University of East Anglia: Minecraft Society</summary>

_This modpack was made for members of the UEA Minecraft Society!
I am still currently refining it, and it's also worth noting that Voxy is still in alpha so you may experience issues with it - remove it if that is the case._

</details>
